title: Youth equipped to lead change through ACTIVATE! training programme
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Twenty-two local students recently completed Module 1 training with ACTIVATE! Change Drivers, a non-profit organisation committed to empowering young South Africans to become active leaders and change agents in their communities.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Twenty-two local students recently completed Module 1 training with ACTIVATE! Change Drivers, a non-profit organisation committed to empowering young South Africans to become active leaders and change agents in their communities."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The four-day training, held at uMasizakhe from 8 to 12 September, aimed to inspire youth to lead positive change while providing them access to broader networks, mentorship and opportunities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Teboho Motlana, training team lead, and Thabiso Oliphant, ACTIVATE! in-community amplifier, explained that young people across South Africa are already quietly driving powerful change, yet their efforts often go unnoticed, unsupported and underfunded.","html":"Teboho Motlana, training team lead, and Thabiso Oliphant, ACTIVATE! in-community amplifier, explained that young people across South Africa are already quietly driving powerful change, yet their efforts often go unnoticed, unsupported and underfunded."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Our goal is to equip youth to be innovative, active citizens, influencing positive change for the global good,” said Oliphant.","html":"“Our goal is to equip youth to be innovative, active citizens, influencing positive change for the global good,” said Oliphant."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ACTIVATE! was founded in January 2012 and has since trained more than 4 500 young South Africans across all nine provinces, embracing diversity in geography, religion, sexual orientation and identity.","html":"ACTIVATE! was founded in January 2012 and has since trained more than 4 500 young South Africans across all nine provinces, embracing diversity in geography, religion, sexual orientation and identity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The programme equips participants with skills in articulation, leadership, socio-political navigation, identity, and activating change.","html":"The programme equips participants with skills in articulation, leadership, socio-political navigation, identity, and activating change."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Each student received a red journal to begin their personal “river of life”, symbolising their journey of growth and action.","html":"Each student received a red journal to begin their personal “river of life”, symbolising their journey of growth and action."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By working closely with local communities, ACTIVATE! seeks to maximise the impact of its programmes and create meaningful opportunities for young leaders.","html":"By working closely with local communities, ACTIVATE! seeks to maximise the impact of its programmes and create meaningful opportunities for young leaders."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organisation’s mission is to build a network of change drivers who can influence social, political and economic spheres while promoting values of generosity, respect, responsibility, and strategic relevance.","html":"The organisation’s mission is to build a network of change drivers who can influence social, political and economic spheres while promoting values of generosity, respect, responsibility, and strategic relevance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Youth equipped to lead change through ACTIVATE! training programme
